name: Dominic Titone
title: Physician
bio: Dr. Titone earned his medical degree at Oregon Health & Science University in Portland, OR. He served his residency in Internal Medicine/Pediatrics at University of Minnesota. His fellowship was served at the University of California, San Diego.  He is board certified in Internal Medicine, Pulmonary, Critical Care and Neuro-Critical Care Medicine.
education: Oregon Health & Science University (OHSU) School of Medicine
residency: Internal Medicine/Pediatrics, University of Minnesota, MN
fellowship: Pulmonary/Critical Care, University of California, San Diego, CA
